moderately_effective.query: Apple stock OR $AAPL OR AAPL today -fruit -food

most_effective_strategies.strategy: Graph Strategy: We currently have no twitter-based evidence about what is moving Apple (AAPL) today. The highest-priority gaps are (1) which stories or tweets are driving price moves, (2) whether Apple/AAPL is trending, and (3) which credible outlets or influencers are posting market-moving content. To close these gaps efficiently and maintain strategic coherence, the next round must: run broad/latest keyword searches to capture breaking posts, check trends to see if Apple/AAPL is a trending topic, and pull timelines/profiles from top financial news accounts to verify credibility and collect source tweets for deeper conversation analysis. This plan uses multiple endpoint types (search, trends, timeline, screenname) to satisfy the mandatory diversity rule and to produce complementary signals (volume + authoritative sources + context).
